title: Case Packer Main Electrical Disconnect
description:
Case Packer Main Electrical Disconnect

Procedure: While standing clear of electrical disconnect, place switch in the OFF position. Apply safety lock and tag. Verify: Attempt to start equipment powered by this disconnect. The equipment must not start and no action should occur. Ensure zero voltage by testing with a voltmeter.

title: Case Packer Main Air Supply Shutoff Valve
description:
Case Packer Main Air Supply Shutoff Valve

Procedure: Place air supply shutoff valve in the closed position. Apply safety lock and tag. Vent residual air pressure manually if not automatically vented. Verify: Pressure gauge must move from operating pressure to 0. If no gauge is present, attempt to manually operate. Equipment must not operate.

title: Control Vertical Axis of Fold Arm
description:
Control Vertical Axis of Fold Arm

Procedure: Place vertical axis of equipment into full bottom position or properly block. Verify: Visually confirm equipment is fully bottomed out or properly blocked and mechanical motion is eliminated.

title: Control/Release Mechanical Motion of Fold Shuttle
description:
Control/Release Mechanical Motion of Fold Shuttle

Procedure: Clamp, block or secure horizontal movement of equipment. Verify: Visually confirm equipment is properly clamped, blocked or secured and mechanical motion is eliminated.

title: Dissipate Thermal Condition at Glue Nozzles
description:
Dissipate Thermal Condition at Glue Nozzles

Procedure: Wait until equipment returns to ambient temperature or use proper PPE. Verify: Use temperature sensing device to ensure equipment has returned to ambient temperature.

title: Dissipate Thermal Condition at Hot Melt Glue Unit
description:
Dissipate Thermal Condition at Hot Melt Glue Unit

Procedure: Wait until equipment returns to ambient temperature or use proper PPE. Verify: Use temperature sensing device to ensure equipment has returned to ambient temperature.

title: Service Electrical Disconnect
description:
Service Electrical Disconnect

Procedure: While standing clear of the electrical box, place the disconnect switch in the OFF position. Apply a safety lock and tag. Verify: Attempt to start the equipment and verify that no action occurs. Ensure zero voltage by testing with a voltmeter.

title: Case Coder Electrical Disconnect
description:
Case Coder Electrical Disconnect

Procedure: Remove the plug from the receptacle. Install a plug lockout device and apply a safety lock and tag. Verify: Attempt to start equipment powered by this plug and verify that no action occurs. Ensure zero voltage before servicing.

title: Exit Conveyor Electrical Disconnect
description:
Exit Conveyor Electrical Disconnect

Procedure: While standing clear of the electrical box, place the disconnect switch in the OFF position. Apply a safety lock and tag. Verify: Attempt to start the equipment and verify that no action occurs. Ensure zero voltage by testing with a voltmeter.

title: Burn Hazard
description:
Burn hazard:
Glue Machine/Nozzle

The glue nozzle is hot.

You must wear PPE if you need to intervene in the operation.

Control measure:
Heat-resistant gloves

Required PPE:
Bump capSafety glasses
Hearing protectionSafety shoes
